latest_channel.pages_behavior: full byte-equivalent mirror of the tested root site

immutable_channel.storage_authority: GitHub Release assets attached to an exact version tag
immutable_channel.pages_prefix_role: metadata index only; it is not an immutable archive by itself

known_releases.archive_backfill_rationale: The exact tested v1.0.0 site bundle was not preserved. Re-rendering the old source with a later toolchain would fabricate historical artifact identity, so no full-site backfill will be published.
known_releases.non_claim: The immutable source tag and release exist; no full immutable v1.0.0 site bundle is claimed or planned for backfill.

known_releases.archive_backfill_rationale: Published from the exact clean CI-tested v2.0.0 site bundle, then redownloaded from the public GitHub Release and verified against the recorded SHA-256.
known_releases.non_claim: The archive preserves the tested rendered site bytes; it does not prove chapter claims, runtime safety, model capability, independent review, or future storage durability.

known_releases.archive_backfill_rationale: Published from the exact clean CI-tested v2.1.0 site bundle, then redownloaded from the public GitHub Release and verified byte-for-byte against the recorded SHA-256.
known_releases.non_claim: The archive preserves the tested rendered site bytes; it does not prove chapter claims, production transfer, runtime safety, model capability, independent review, or future storage durability.

known_releases.archive_backfill_rationale: Published from the exact clean CI-tested v2.2.0 site bundle, then redownloaded from the public GitHub Release and verified byte-for-byte against the recorded SHA-256.
known_releases.non_claim: The archive preserves the tested rendered site bytes; it does not prove chapter claims, production transfer, runtime safety, model capability, independent review, or future storage durability.

known_releases.archive_backfill_rationale: Published from the exact clean CI-tested v2.3.0 site bundle, then redownloaded from the public GitHub Release and verified byte-for-byte against the recorded SHA-256.
known_releases.non_claim: The archive preserves the tested rendered site bytes; it does not prove chapter claims, natural-task transfer, learned-model behavior, production safety, independent validation, AGI, ASI, or future storage durability.

non_claims: A moving latest mirror is not an immutable release.
A Pages versions index is metadata, not durable artifact storage.
An immutable site artifact exists only when a release record names its exact URL and SHA-256.
A later render of an old source tag is not represented as the historical tested site.
